name: KNIME source mining script chain
purpose: Formal workflow index for KNIME source-repository mining, from local OSS repository cloning through cross-snapshot node metadata summaries.

handoff_terms.automatic: The next step consumes files written by this step without required manual editing.
handoff_terms.semi_automatic: The script produces or consumes an intermediate state that may require manual action, such as verifying a local clone or checkout state.
handoff_terms.manual: The step is not currently represented by a deterministic script and must be performed or edited by a human before the next scripted step is meaningful.

knime_source_mining_chain.name: Clone KNIME OSS repositories
automatic_validation: Discover and retain the current public repository inventory from the GitHub organization API.
Clone missing repositories and fetch existing repositories.
Validate each expected Git worktree, origin remote, and HEAD commit.
Fail on missing, invalid, or unexpected local Git repositories.
Write a per-repository CSV manifest and return a nonzero exit status on any validation failure.
knime_source_mining_chain.notes: This step depends on network and external GitHub availability. The discovered inventory and validation outcomes are recorded because the public organization membership can change over time.

knime_source_mining_chain.name: Checkout KNIME repositories by snapshot date
knime_source_mining_chain.notes: Checks out each repository to the requested date and writes a checkout manifest.

knime_source_mining_chain.name: Collect KNIME node metadata snapshot
input: local KNIME_OSS_ROOT clone directory checked out at SNAPSHOT_DATE
knime_source_mining_chain.notes: Parses structured XML metadata rather than grepping source text.

knime_source_mining_chain.name: Build cross-snapshot KNIME node summary
knime_source_mining_chain.notes: Builds derived longitudinal counts and transition approximations across snapshot directories.

out_of_scope_for_current_scripts: Fully automatic KNIME workflow execution and repair
Automatic repair of missing, deprecated, migrated, or extension-dependent KNIME workflow nodes
